info.title: Mini ERP API
info.description: Import this file into Hoppscotch to test the Mini ERP backend endpoints.

servers.description: Local backend alternate if port 5000 is busy

example.message: Mini ERP API and MySQL connection are healthy

post.description: Admin role signup is blocked unless ALLOW_ADMIN_SIGNUP=true in the backend environment.

201.description: User created and access token returned

409.description: Login ID or email already exists

401.description: Missing, invalid, expired, or inactive user token
Missing, invalid, expired, or inactive user token

get.summary: Get logged-in user's module and field permissions

401.description: Missing, invalid, expired, or inactive user token

get.description: Supports list, search, dashboard filters, my orders, late orders, and kanban-style status filtering.

post.summary: Create sales order in Draft status

get.summary: Get sales order with lines and availability

patch.description: Only Draft Sales Orders can be edited. Confirmed orders become readonly except delivery quantities through the deliver action.

409.description: Sales Order status does not allow editing

post.description: Changes status from Draft to Confirmed and writes an audit log.

409.description: Sales Order status does not allow this action

post.description: Sets delivered quantities, changes status to Partially Delivered or Fully Delivered, decreases product stock, creates stock ledger rows, and writes audit logs.

409.description: Sales Order status does not allow this action

post.description: Cancels a Draft, Confirmed, or Partially Delivered Sales Order and writes an audit log.

409.description: Sales Order status does not allow this action

get.description: Supports list, search, dashboard filters, my orders, late orders, and kanban-style status filtering.

post.summary: Create purchase order in Draft status

patch.description: Only Draft Purchase Orders can be edited. Confirmed orders become readonly except received quantities through the receive action.

409.description: Purchase Order status does not allow editing

post.description: Changes status from Draft to Confirmed and writes an audit log.

409.description: Purchase Order status does not allow this action

post.description: Sets received quantities, changes status to Partially Received or Fully Received, increases product stock, creates stock ledger rows, and writes audit logs.

409.description: Purchase Order status does not allow this action

post.description: Cancels a Draft, Confirmed, or Partially Received Purchase Order and writes an audit log.

409.description: Purchase Order status does not allow this action

post.description: Creates a BOM template with components and operations for later use on Manufacturing Orders.

get.summary: Get bill of materials with components and operations

sales_unit_price.description: Optional. Defaults from Product Sales Price.

delivered_qty.description: Absolute delivered quantity for the sales order line.

cost_price.description: Optional. Defaults from Product Cost Price.

received_qty.description: Absolute received quantity for the purchase order line.
